name: Pottsfield Pickle Ala David Coons
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut all the vegetables and add salt.
2. Let the mixture set overnight, drain and rinse twice with water.
3. Add spices, vinegar, and sugar; cook until tender. It will be juicy.
4. Pour into hot, sterile jars, leaving 1/4 inch headspace.
5. Adjust lids and process for 15 minutes in boiling water bath.
Makes 6-8 pints.
